CVE-2022-26345.title: Uncontrolled search path element in the Intel(R) oneAPI Toolkit O ...
CVE-2022-26345.description: Uncontrolled search path element in the Intel(R) oneAPI Toolkit OpenMP before version 2022.1 may allow an authenticated user to potentially enable escalation of privilege via local access.
